_instructions: Test data catalogue for the api-testing skill. Entries are added via the skill's dataset management workflow — do not edit manually. Each entry is scoped to one endpoint and one scenario type. The 'file_refs' field points to files in the api-testing/assets/ folder.

_asset_files.assets/sample-hair-photo.jpg: Default hair photo for inquiry creation and related endpoints. JPEG format.
_asset_files.assets/sample-passport.png: Default passport scan for logistics flow (Create/Update Passport Details). PNG format.
